_comment: Gameplay tuning file for cat laser-play behaviors. JSON has no native comments; *_comment fields are documentation and ignored by the loader.

catch_radius._comment: How close the laser must be to count as a catch attempt.
catch_radius.base_scale_comment: Multiplier on cat box perimeter proxy (width+height).
catch_radius.min_radius_comment: Lower clamp for base catch radius (px).
catch_radius.max_radius_comment: Upper clamp for base catch radius (px).
catch_radius.confidence_norm_scale_comment: Normalization range width for confidence effects.
catch_radius.near_dist_diag_scale_comment: Near distance threshold in bbox diagonals.
catch_radius.far_dist_diag_scale_comment: Far distance threshold in bbox diagonals.
catch_radius.distance_scale_gain_comment: Extra multiplier when laser is closer.
catch_radius.clamp_min_comment: Final minimum clamp after all scaling.
catch_radius.clamp_max_comment: Final maximum clamp after all scaling.

common.speed_norm_divisor_comment: Cat px/s value mapping to speed_norm≈1.
common.novelty_recovery_rate_comment: How quickly scores drift back to baseline.
common.novelty_active_fatigue_rate_comment: Additional decay for currently active algorithm.
common.novelty_min_score_comment: Lower floor for algorithm engagement scores.

oval.margin_scale_comment: Scales base oval from cat box size.
oval.scaled_min_comment: Min final oval radius after challenge/confidence scaling.
oval.scaled_max_comment: Max final oval radius after challenge/confidence scaling.
oval.flip_chance_min_comment: Min chance to reverse oval direction on catch.
oval.flip_chance_max_comment: Max chance to reverse oval direction on catch.

near_miss.trigger_base_comment: Base per-second trigger chance for near-miss tease.
near_miss.low_engagement_threshold_comment: Below this, trigger probability gets boost.
near_miss.radius_min_comment: Base lower radius multiplier vs catch radius.
near_miss.radius_max_comment: Base upper radius multiplier vs catch radius.
near_miss.initial_radius_scale_comment: Default radius scale at state init.
near_miss.pause_min_gain_comment: Added lower pause bound when catch success is low.
near_miss.pause_max_gain_comment: Added upper pause bound when catch success is low.
near_miss.pause_challenge_min_gain_comment: Challenge shortening factor for pause min.
near_miss.pause_challenge_max_gain_comment: Challenge shortening factor for pause max.
near_miss.segment_min_sec_comment: Min duration of one near-miss orbital segment.
near_miss.segment_max_sec_comment: Max duration of one near-miss orbital segment.
near_miss.direction_flip_percent_comment: Chance (%) to flip orbit direction after segment.
near_miss.pass_bias_scale_comment: Scales additional near-miss passes from catch success.

stare_dart.hold_min_sec_comment: Short hold lower bound entering stare-dart.
stare_dart.hold_max_sec_comment: Short hold upper bound entering stare-dart.
stare_dart.long_hold_min_sec_comment: Main hold lower bound while in stare-dart cycles.
stare_dart.long_hold_max_sec_comment: Main hold upper bound while in stare-dart cycles.
stare_dart.low_speed_threshold_comment: Max speed_norm to allow oval->stare-dart bait transition.
stare_dart.low_speed_dart_prob_comment: Base chance factor for low-speed dart transition.

zigzag.front_y_offset_comment: Front target above cat center as height fraction.
zigzag.retreat_clearance_px_comment: Clearance from cat bbox when selecting retreat target.
zigzag.amp_x_scale_comment: Base X shake amplitude scale by cat width.
zigzag.amp_y_scale_comment: Base Y shake amplitude scale by cat height.
zigzag.wave_speed_gain_comment: Additional oscillation speed from cat speed_norm.
zigzag.challenge_arc_base_comment: Base challenge arc scale before challenge subtraction.
zigzag.challenge_shake_duration_min_comment: Min multiplier for challenge-adjusted shake duration.
zigzag.challenge_shake_duration_max_comment: Max multiplier for challenge-adjusted shake duration.
zigzag.amp_x_scaled_min_comment: Min final X amplitude after all scaling.
zigzag.amp_x_scaled_max_comment: Max final X amplitude after all scaling.
zigzag.amp_y_scaled_min_comment: Min final Y amplitude after all scaling.
zigzag.amp_y_scaled_max_comment: Max final Y amplitude after all scaling.

engagement._comment: Low-level engagement signal shaping and state smoothing.
engagement.near_target_radius_scale_comment: Near-target zone radius as factor of catch radius.
engagement.dwell_ramp_sec_comment: Time to saturate dwell quality bonus.
engagement.dwell_decay_rate_comment: How quickly dwell memory decays outside target zone.
engagement.catch_bonus_comment: Bonus when laser enters catch radius.
engagement.reengage_min_disengaged_sec_comment: Minimum disengaged time before re-engage bonus can apply.
engagement.reengage_norm_sec_comment: Normalization window for re-engagement latency bonus.
engagement.catch_attempt_decay_comment: EMA keep factor for catch-attempt history.
engagement.catch_attempt_gain_comment: EMA gain for new catch-attempt event.
engagement.score_ema_keep_comment: EMA keep factor for engagement score.
engagement.velocity_ema_keep_comment: EMA keep factor for cat speed estimate.
engagement.velocity_ema_gain_comment: EMA gain for cat speed estimate.
engagement.challenge_ema_keep_comment: EMA keep factor for challenge ladder level.
engagement.challenge_ema_gain_comment: EMA gain for challenge ladder level.
engagement.near_target_challenge_weight_comment: Challenge decrease weight for near-target misses.
engagement.catch_challenge_weight_comment: Challenge increase weight for catch streaks.

hesitation._comment: Pause logic after sustained intense close chase.
hesitation.close_chase_speed_threshold_comment: Min speed_norm to count as intense chase.
hesitation.close_chase_dist_scale_comment: Close-chase distance threshold as factor of catch radius.
hesitation.close_chase_decay_rate_comment: Decay rate of close-chase accumulator when condition breaks.
hesitation.close_chase_trigger_sec_comment: Accumulator threshold that triggers hesitation pause.
hesitation.cooldown_max_clamp_comment: Clamp upper bound for cooldown timer bookkeeping.

behavior._comment: Session-scale behavior orchestration and challenge scaling.
behavior.still_distance_px_comment: Distance threshold below which cat is considered still.
behavior.still_switch_sec_comment: Stillness duration before forcing algorithm switch.
behavior.session_calm_trigger_sec_comment: Active play duration before inserting calm pause.
behavior.oval_phase_base_step_comment: Base oval phase increment per tick.
behavior.oval_phase_speed_gain_comment: Additional oval phase increment from speed_norm.
behavior.oval_challenge_speed_min_comment: Min challenge speed multiplier for oval.
behavior.oval_challenge_speed_max_comment: Max challenge speed multiplier for oval.
behavior.oval_challenge_arc_base_comment: Base oval arc multiplier before challenge reduction.
behavior.near_target_challenge_min_comment: Lower clamp for challenge ladder value.
behavior.near_target_challenge_max_comment: Upper clamp for challenge ladder value.
behavior.random_gate_scale_comment: Scale used for dt-conditioned random gates.
behavior.random_gate_min_comment: Lower clamp for random gate multiplier.
behavior.random_gate_max_comment: Upper clamp for random gate multiplier.
behavior.transition_base_percent_comment: Base transition probability percent used in confidence-scaled transitions.
behavior.rounding_bias_comment: Bias used before floor() when converting float probabilities to ints.
behavior.transition_weight_epsilon_comment: Minimum total director transition weight before fallback selection.

director._comment: High-level intent scheduler controlling style bias and algorithm switching pressure.
director.tease_to_oval_switch_prob_comment: Chance to force OVAL under TEASE intent.
director.chase_oval_to_zigzag_switch_prob_comment: Chance to switch OVAL->ZIGZAG under CHASE intent.
director.pounce_to_oval_switch_prob_comment: Chance to force OVAL under POUNCE intent.
director.chase_zigzag_speed_scale_comment: Zigzag speed multiplier under CHASE intent.
director.chase_zigzag_duration_scale_comment: Zigzag duration multiplier under CHASE intent.
director.pounce_oval_speed_scale_comment: Oval speed multiplier under POUNCE intent.
director.recover_oval_speed_scale_comment: Oval speed multiplier under RECOVER intent.
director.recover_zigzag_speed_scale_comment: Zigzag speed multiplier under RECOVER intent.
director.recover_zigzag_duration_scale_comment: Zigzag duration multiplier under RECOVER intent.
director.director_duration_min_sec_comment: Min duration of one intent block.
director.director_duration_max_sec_comment: Max duration of one intent block.
director.director_w_tease_base_comment: Base selection weight for TEASE intent.
director.director_w_tease_low_engage_gain_comment: Additional TEASE weight when engagement is low.
director.director_w_chase_base_comment: Base selection weight for CHASE intent.
director.director_w_chase_speed_gain_comment: Additional CHASE weight as speed rises.
director.director_w_pounce_base_comment: Base selection weight for POUNCE intent.
director.director_w_pounce_catch_gain_comment: Additional POUNCE weight as catch success rises.
director.director_w_pounce_low_speed_gain_comment: Additional POUNCE weight when speed is low.
director.director_w_recover_base_comment: Base selection weight for RECOVER intent.
director.director_w_recover_speed_minus_engage_ga: Additional RECOVER weight when speed exceeds engagement.

confidence_fallback._comment: Lower confidence -> calmer/less twitchy behavior; high confidence -> more dynamic.
confidence_fallback.speed_scale_min_comment: Minimum speed multiplier at very low confidence.
confidence_fallback.speed_scale_gain_comment: Additional speed multiplier at high confidence.
confidence_fallback.dart_scale_min_comment: Minimum dart aggressiveness at low confidence.
confidence_fallback.dart_scale_gain_comment: Extra dart aggressiveness at high confidence.
confidence_fallback.transition_scale_base_comment: Base transition scaling at low confidence.
confidence_fallback.transition_scale_gain_comment: Additional transition scaling at high confidence.
confidence_fallback.zigzag_duration_low_conf_gain_comment: Extra zigzag duration under low confidence.
